recommendations.title: All the Names of God
recommendations.overview: After being implicated in a terrorist attack, Santi, a taxi driver, is taken hostage by one of the perpetrators.

recommendations.title: Sky High
recommendations.overview: A commentary on Spanish society dressed as a thriller about the misadventures of a gang of young petty criminals after the real estate crash.

recommendations.title: Twin Murders: The Silence of the White City
recommendations.overview: Vitoria-Gasteiz, Basque Country, Spain, 2019. Two corpses appear in the crypt of the Old Cathedral. Police officer Unai López de Ayala, an expert in criminal profiling, must hunt down the ritual murderer who has been terrorizing the city for two deca

recommendations.title: The Warning
recommendations.overview: Ten-year-old Nico receives a threatening letter and now his life is in danger. No one seems to believe him except one person that he doesn't know.

recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: After shrewdly seizing his chance to join a money-laundering scheme, a modest valet dives into a world of fast cash, fast cars — and an inevitable crash.

recommendations.title: Centauro
recommendations.overview: Rafa's hooked on the pure, fiery feelings he gets from speed racing, but when his kid's mom gets mixed up with drug dealers, he burns rubber to save her.

recommendations.title: Mikaela

recommendations.title: Combustion

recommendations.title: Dog Day Afternoon
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of would-be Brooklyn bank robbers John Wojtowicz and Salvatore Naturile. Sonny and Sal attempt a bank heist which quickly turns sour and escalates into a hostage situation and stand-off with the police. As Sonny's motives for

recommendations.title: Inside Man
recommendations.overview: When an armed, masked gang enter a Manhattan bank, lock the doors and take hostages, the detective assigned to effect their release enters negotiations preoccupied with corruption charges he is facing.
